name: constant_path
description: The root guide routes file-mapping work to the scoped OpenFeature guide.
prompt: Start at the repository root and do not modify files. A contributor plans to add Datadog::OpenFeature::FlagEvaluation::BatchEncoder with unit tests and an RBS signature. Inspect the repository guidance that governs this task. Return instruction_files as repository-relative paths, ordered from broadest to most specific. In answer, give the exact production, spec, and signature paths and briefly explain the file-mapping rule.
